## [00:00 - 00:53]

What's up guys, Cole here. This is just a quick reminder. You should be watching this video at the end of week two, the Getting Hired Week. And I just want to talk about one thing that we mentioned in the very first module of this entire training, which is celebration. So as you go into the recruiting pool, as you're implementing the training from week two, your landing interviews, you're getting yourself out there, all of that stuff, make sure you let us know you post in the group one, when you land your first gig, let us know what the gig is, details, why you're excited, et cetera. And then also when you make your first sale. And then when you make your first sale, follow this format of, hey, first sale made, deal size, commissions, and an under X amount of days from being on the offer. And then any other details, of course, that you want to include more than happy to. So just wanted to make sure you guys see this again. And don't forget to celebrate when we get these wins. Let's do it guys, we'll see you in the next video.
